argentina.jersey: official Argentina national team jersey (light blue and white vertical stripes, EXACTLY three gold stars above the AFA crest — three stars, not two)

brasil.jersey: official Brazil national team jersey (canary yellow with green collar, CBF crest on chest, green shorts)

francia.jersey: official France national team jersey (deep navy blue, FFF rooster crest on chest, white shorts)

alemania.jersey: official Germany national team jersey (white with black collar, DFB eagle crest on chest, black shorts)

españa.jersey: official Spain national team jersey (red with yellow collar, RFEF crest on chest, dark navy shorts)

uruguay.jersey: official Uruguay national team jersey (sky blue, AUF crest on chest, black shorts)

colombia.jersey: official Colombia national team jersey (bright yellow with red and dark blue side stripes, FCF crest on chest, dark navy shorts)
